title: SourceA W1 — governed agent execution
hook: If AI executes without governance, it fails.

beats.label: Beat 1 — BLOCK
beats.title: Policy change without approval
beats.narration: Watch what happens when an agent tries to change Copilot policy without approval. The governance gate blocks it. No receipt lands on the spine. Execution stops cold.

beats.label: Beat 2 — ALLOW
beats.title: Valid change with approval reference
beats.narration: Same action — but now with an approval reference and passing gate checks. The commit lands. A signed receipt is written to disk with a checksum you can replay.

beats.label: Beat 3 — tamper FAIL
beats.title: Receipt tamper detected
beats.narration: Now someone edits the receipt by hand. The validator fails immediately. Tamper evidence is visible. This is the proof layer buyers actually need.

beats.label: Beat 4 — kill switch
beats.title: Factory freeze on disk
beats.narration: The kill switch lives on disk — not in chat memory. When auto-run is disabled, the factory stops. Human approval stays in the loop.

cta.narration: SourceA — runtime governance infrastructure. Book fifteen minutes to walk through BLOCK, heal, and replay on your stack.
